news.title:
JM Financial, a leading financial services group, targets high RoE businesses, shifting from balance sheet-heavy operations.
Buy rating with a target of ₹160; undervaluation in wealth, AMC, private markets offers investment opportunity.
news.summary:
JM Financial, a leading financial services group, targets high RoE businesses, shifting from balance sheet-heavy operations.

news.title:
JM Financial downgrades Swiggy to 'Reduce', cuts target price by 27% to Rs 270 citing weak Instamart strategy.
Swiggy faces market share losses, rising competition, and negative EBITDA till FY29; Instamart deemed value-destructive.
news.summary:
JM Financial downgrades Swiggy to 'Reduce', cuts target price by 27% to Rs 270 citing weak Instamart strategy.
Swiggy faces market share losses, rising competition, and negative EBITDA till FY29; Instamart deemed value-destructive.

news.title:
Nagaraj Shetti recommends JM Financial (₹131 target ₹141) and Canara Bank (₹140 target ₹150) for short-term buy.
Nifty 50 and Sensex fell on April 9 due to Middle East tensions; analysts suggest a buy-on-dips strategy.
news.summary:
Nagaraj Shetti recommends JM Financial (₹131 target ₹141) and Canara Bank (₹140 target ₹150) for short-term buy.
Nifty 50 and Sensex fell on April 9 due to Middle East tensions; analysts suggest a buy-on-dips strategy.

news.title:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.
news.summary:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.

news.title:
JM Financial Ltd received an ESG score of 73 ('Leader' category) from NSE Sustainability Ratings.
The ESG rating was independently assigned based on FY 2024-25 data from public sources.
news.summary:

news.title:
Gold and silver prices may remain range-bound amid geopolitical tensions in West Asia and key US data, analysts say.
Gold futures fell marginally, while silver rose 0.5% on MCX; rupee weakness supports domestic bullion prices.

JM Financial invests Rs 33.7 crore in its overseas unit to fuel global expansion.
This move aims to support and accelerate the company's international growth strategy.

news.title:
JM Financial Ltd to acquire 24.25 lakh shares of JM Financial Overseas Holdings at $3.59M (₹33.7 Cr).
Acquisition supports JMFOHPL's overseas expansion; target entity operates in Mauritius as an investment holding company.
news.summary:
JM Financial Ltd to acquire 24.25 lakh shares of JM Financial Overseas Holdings at $3.59M (₹33.7 Cr).

news.title:

news.title:
NSE sets 0.65% advisory fee for its $2.5B IPO, totaling $16.25M.
Six lead banks, including Kotak Mahindra and JM Financial, will share the fees.

news.title:
JM Financial maintains 'Buy' for Infosys citing steady demand, $4.8B deal wins, and FY26 revenue growth guidance of 3-3.5%.

SEBI's new MF guidelines aim to reduce overlaps and enhance product differentiation.
Changes include lifecycle funds, rationalised sectoral exposure, and co-existing value and contra funds.

news.title:
India's top 100 unlisted firms are valued at ₹28.5 lakh crore, surpassing Finland's GDP.
They generated ₹8.9 lakh crore revenue in 2025 vs ₹6.7 lakh crore in 2023, showing a 15% CAGR.
news.summary:
India's top 100 unlisted firms are valued at ₹28.5 lakh crore, surpassing Finland's GDP.
